description:
## Problem

`src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` has 14 pre-existing ameba findings that the
formatter / linter can resolve (or that are minor code cleanups). All
14 are unrelated to the reliability/DRY refactor tracked under the
parent epic, but they were uncovered while running ameba during
`quickhea-3ds.9`.

## Findings

```
src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr:1:1   [C] Lint/Formatting                  (formatter)
src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr:68:12 [W] Lint/UselessAssign              (code fix)
src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr:311:1 [C] Layout/TrailingWhitespace       (formatter)
src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr:328:1 [C] Layout/TrailingWhitespace       (formatter)
src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr:337:1 [C] Layout/TrailingWhitespace       (formatter)
src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr:346:1 [C] Layout/TrailingWhitespace       (formatter)
src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr:351:1 [C] Layout/TrailingWhitespace       (formatter)
src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr:360:1 [C] Layout/TrailingWhitespace       (formatter)
src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr:366:1 [C] Layout/TrailingWhitespace       (formatter)
src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr:370:1 [C] Layout/TrailingWhitespace       (formatter)
src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr:697:1 [C] Layout/TrailingWhitespace       (formatter, post .9)
src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr:732:1 [C] Layout/TrailingWhitespace       (formatter, post .9)
src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr:737:1 [C] Layout/TrailingWhitespace       (formatter, post .9)
src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr:918:1 [C] Layout/TrailingBlankLines       (formatter)
```

## Fix

Two parts:

1. **Run `crystal tool format src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr`** to auto-fix
   13 of the 14 findings (formatting + trailing whitespace + missing
   trailing newline). The formatter will touch unrelated lines (pre-
   existing whitespace drift), which is acceptable as a one-time cleanup
   for the file.

2. **Fix `Lint/UselessAssign` at line 68** manually. The pattern is:

   ```crystal
   until (v = CONCURRENCY_AVAILABLE.get) >= CONCURRENCY_LIMIT
     CONCURRENCY_AVAILABLE.add(1, :relaxed)
     CONCURRENCY_SEMAPHORE.send(nil)
   end
   ```

   `v` is bound but never used. Replace with:

   ```crystal
   while CONCURRENCY_AVAILABLE.get < CONCURRENCY_LIMIT
     CONCURRENCY_AVAILABLE.add(1, :relaxed)
     CONCURRENCY_SEMAPHORE.send(nil)
   end
   ```

## Acceptance

- `nix develop . --command ameba src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` returns 0 findings.
- `crystal tool format --check src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` exits 0.
- `just nix-build` passes; existing Crystal specs pass.
- Diff is focused on `src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` only.

## Out of scope

- The remaining ~98 ameba findings in other files
  (`src/config/loader.cr`, `src/controllers/proxy_controller.cr`,
  `src/favicon_storage.cr`, etc.). Those belong to a separate project-
  wide cleanup effort and should be tracked under a new ticket/parent.
title: Chore: ameba cleanup for refresh_loop.cr (14 findings)
